cmd:
import subprocess
import sys
src = sys.argv[1] + '/*'
dest   = sys.argv[2]
print subprocess.check_output('scp -r %s %s' % (src, dest), shell=True)
name: scp -r [START_DIR]/skia/resources foo@127.0.0.1:/home/chronos/user/resources
